g.style: color: rgb(31, 45, 61); background-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0); fill: rgb(255, 248, 204); stroke: rgb(201, 162, 39); stroke-width: 1px; opacity: 1; stroke-dasharray: 5px, 5px; font-size: 16px; font-family: sans-serif; text-anchor: start; padding: 0px; margin: 0px;

rect.style: background-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0); color: rgb(31, 45, 61); fill: rgb(236, 236, 255); stroke: rgb(147, 112, 219); stroke-width: 1px; opacity: 1; stroke-dasharray: 5px, 5px; font-size: 16px; font-family: sans-serif; text-anchor: start; padding: 0px; margin: 0px;

foreignObject.style: background-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0); color: rgb(31, 45, 61); fill: rgb(255, 248, 204); stroke: rgb(201, 162, 39); stroke-width: 1px; opacity: 1; stroke-dasharray: 5px, 5px; font-size: 16px; font-family: sans-serif; text-anchor: start; padding: 0px; margin: 0px;

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; color: rgb(31, 45, 61); background-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0); fill: rgb(255, 248, 204); stroke: rgb(201, 162, 39); stroke-width: 1px; opacity: 1; stroke-dasharray: 5px, 5px; font-size: 16px; font-family: sans-serif; text-anchor: start; padding: 0px; margin: 0px;

span.style: color: rgb(31, 45, 61); background-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0); fill: rgb(255, 248, 204); stroke: rgb(201, 162, 39); stroke-width: 1px; opacity: 1; stroke-dasharray: 5px, 5px; font-size: 16px; font-family: sans-serif; text-anchor: start; padding: 0px; margin: 0px;

p.style: background-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0); color: rgb(31, 45, 61); fill: rgb(255, 248, 204); stroke: rgb(201, 162, 39); stroke-width: 1px; opacity: 1; stroke-dasharray: 5px, 5px; font-size: 16px; font-family: sans-serif; text-anchor: start; padding: 0px 2px; margin: 0px;
